General.Name: Smart Globe Holdings
General.Description: Smart Globe Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in production, distribution, and printing of books, and novelty and packaging products. It operates through Printing Business and Supply Chain Management Service Business segments. The company offers oversized books, coffee table books, conventional art books, wire-o, spiral, pop-ups, board books, jigsaw, lift the flap, glow in the dark, packaging boxes, stationery, leather journals, and multi-function electronic case holders, as well as box products, children's books, journals, stationery, and photo albums. It also provides a suite of services, including pre-press, printing, and finishing services, as well as produces customized and value-added printing products. The company operates in Hong Kong, the United States, the United Kingdom, the Netherlands, Australia, the People's Republic of China, France, Zambia, South Africa, Germany, and internationally. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: One Island East, Quarry Bay, Hong Kong
